title: IAS-Sikkim-Cadre-and-Pay-2015

त पद सं榐या 48” [फा. सं. 11031/03/2015-अ.भा.से.-II-क] राजीव जैन, अवर सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी 1 णी 1 णी 1 णी 1: इस अिधसूचना के जारी होने से पूव榁, िस琈猳म के भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा संवग榁 के कुल 灹ािधकृत पद犘 क琉 सं榐या 48 थी । 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी (2): णी (2): णी (2): णी (2): मु榐य िनयम 琈दनांक 14.09.1954 क琉 एस आर ओ सं. 158 獧ारा भारत के राजप灴 म犆 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे । मु榐य िनयम犘 क琉 अनुसूची ।।। म犆 िस琈猳म संवग榁 के संदभ榁 म犆 िन瀓निलिखत सा.का.िन. सं榐या猒 तथा ितिथय犘 獧ारा संशोिधत 琈कया गया था : -- 1 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 15 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th August, 2015. G.S.R. 658(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rule (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Administrative Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Sikkim, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:- 1. (i) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of cadre Strength) Second Amendment Regulations, 2015. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the schedule to the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, for the heading “Sikkim” and the entries occurring there under, the following shall be substituted namely:- “SIKKIM Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 27 Chief Secretary to the Government 1 Additional Chief Secretary 1 Principal Secretary 4 Commissioner-cum-Secretary 8 Secretary to Government/Joint Secretaries/Deputy Secretaries 9 District Magistrate and Collector 4 1. Total Senior Duty Posts 27 2. Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 40% of item 1 above 10 3. State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of item 1 above 06 4. Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of item 1 above 01 5. Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of item 1 above 04 6. Posts to be filled by promotion under Rule 8 of The Indian Administrative Service(Recruitment) Rules, 1954 not exceeding 33 1/3% of item 1,2,3 & 4 14 7. Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Items 1+2+3+4+5-6) 34 Total Authorized Strength 48” [F. No. 11031/03/2015- AIS-II (A)] RAJIV JAIN, Under Secy. Note (1): Prior to issue of this notification, the Total Authorized Strength of Sikkim Cadre was 48. 灙.सं. सा.का.िन.सं. तारीख 灙.सं. सा.का.िन.सं. तारीख 1 404 अ 16.06.76 8 739 अ 31.12.97 2 419 08.05.82 9 367 अ 19.05.99 3 123 15.02.86 10 224 09.07.05 4 190 26.03.88 11 79 अ 08.02.08 5 872 12.11.88 12 188 अ 24.03.09 6 237 15.05.93 13 688अ 19.08.2010 7 319 अ 31.03.95 -- 2 of 5 -- 16 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Note (2): The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide SRO No.158 dated 14.9.1954. Schedule III of the Principal Rules in respect of Sikkim have been amended vide G.S.R. Nos. and dates: Sl.No. GSR No. Date Sl.No. GSR No. Date 1 404 E 16.06.76 8 739 E 31.12.97 2 419 08.05.82 9 367 E 19.05.99 3 123 15.02.86 10 224 09.07.05 4 190 26.03.88 11 79 E 08.02.08 5 872 12.11.88 12 188 E 24.03.09 6 237 15.05.93 13 688E 19.08.2010 7 319 E 31.03.95 अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई 琈द瀖ली, 25 अग瀡त, 20151 सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. सा.का.िन. 659 659 659 659(अ) (अ) (अ) (अ)....— — — — अिखल भारतीय सेवा अिधिनयम, 1951 (1951 का 61) क琉 धारा 3 क琉 उप धारा (i) 獧ारा 灹दत शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, के瀈灶 सरकार, िस琈猳म सरकार के परामश榁 से भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (वेतन) िनयमावली, 2007 म犆 आगे और संशोधन करने के िलए एतद獧ारा िन玈िलिखत िनयम बनाती है, अथा榁त् :- 1. (i) ये िनयम भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (वेतन) ि獧तीय संशोधन िनयमावली, 2015 होगा। (ii) ये िनयम शासक琉य राजप灴 म犆 उनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृत ह犘गे । 2. भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (वेतन) िनयमावली, 2007 म犆:- (क) तािलका “अनुसूची ।।-क, म犆 रा榖य सरकार犘 के अधीन भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा म犆 वेतनमान के ऊपर के वेतन वाले पद犘” म犆 灹थम कॉलम म犆 “िस琈猳म” 灹िवि玗 और दूसरे कॉलम म犆 तदनु牲पी 灹िवि玗य犘 के िलए िन玈िलिखत 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा अथा榁त्:- ““““िस琈猳म िस琈猳म िस琈猳म िस琈猳म सरकार के मु榐य सिचव 80,000/- 牲. (िनयत) अपर मु榐य सिचव एचएजी वेतनमान: 67000 牲 . (वा琔षक वेतनवृि獳 3%क琉 दर से)-79000/-牲. 灹धान सिचव एचएजी वेतनमान: 67000 牲 . (वा琔षक वेतनवृि獳 3%क琉 दर से)-79000/-牲. आयु榉त-सह-सिचव पीबी-4 + 灡ेड वेतन 牱. 10000 (ख) “ अनुसूची II- भाग ख” म犆 वेतन के अित琇र榉त िवशेष वेतन वाले पद犘 सिहत रा榖य सरकार犘 के अधीन भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा के व琇र瀠ठ वेतनमान वाले पद犘 म犆 ‘िस琈猳म’ शीष榁क के तहत आने वाली 灹िवि玗य犘 के िलए िन瀓निलिखत 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त् :- “सरकार के सिचव/संयु榉त सिचव/उप सिचव िजलाधीश और समाहता榁 ” [फा.सं. 11031/03/2015-अ.भा.से.-II-ख ] राजीव जैन, अवर सिचव -- 3 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 17 琇ट瀉पणी 琇ट瀉पणी 琇ट瀉पणी 琇ट瀉पणी : मु榐य िनयम 20.03.2008 क琉 जी.एस.आर. 213 (अ) 獧ारा भारत के असाधारण राजप灴 म犆 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और बाद म犆 िन瀓निलिखत सा.का.िन. सं榐या और 琈दनांक 獧ारा संशोिधत 琈कए गए : 灙.सं. सा.का.िन.सं. तारीख 灙.सं. सा.का.िन.सं. तारीख 1 665 अ 19.09.08 21 922 अ 30.12.11 2 123 अ 15.04.09 22 94 अ 16.02.12 3 542 अ 21.07.09 23 115 अ 28.03.12 4 572 अ 13.08.09 24 325 अ 26.04.12 5 820 अ 12.11.09 25 941 अ 28.12.12 6 72 अ 10.02.10 26 55 अ 31.01.13 7 102 अ 25.02.10 27 104 अ 18.02.13 8 191 अ 12.03.10 28 602 अ 06.09.13 9 298 अ 08.04.10 29 604 अ 06.09.13 10 397 अ 11.05.10 30 45 अ 22.01.14 11 404अ 13.05.10 31 47 अ 22.01.14 12 413 अ 17.05.10 32 302 अ 29.04.14 13 432 अ 20.05.10 33 384 अ 18.07.14 14 434 अ 20.05.10 34 720 अ 13.10.14 15 451 अ 26.05.10 35 939 अ 31.12.14 16 689 अ 19.08.10 36 102 अ 16.02.15 17 836 अ 13.10.10 18 899 अ 09.11.10 19 954 अ 06.12.10 20 920 अ 30.12.11 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th August, 2015 G.S.R. 659 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Sikkim hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, namely: - 1. (i) These rules may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Second Amendment Rules, 2014. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2007:- In “Schedule II-Part A” posts carrying pay above the senior scale of pay of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Sikkim” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely: “Sikkim Chief Secretary to Government Rs.80000/-(fixed) Additional Chief Secretary HAG Scale – Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%)-79000/- Principal Secretary HAG Scale – Rs. 67000/-(annual increment @ 3%)-79000/- . Commissioner-cum-Secretary PB-4 + GP Rs.10000/- -- 4 of 5 -- 18 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (b) In “Schedule II - Part B” Posts carrying pay in the senior scale of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments including posts carrying special allowance in addition to pay, for the entries occurring under ‘Sikkim, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “Secretary to Government/Joint Secretaries/Deputy Secretaries District Magistrate and Collector” [F. No. 11031/03/2015- AIS-II (B)] RAJIV JAIN, Under Secy. Note: The Principal Rules were published in the Extraordinary Gazette of India, vide GSR No. 213(E), dated the 20.03.2008 and subsequently were amended vide following GSR numbers and dates:- Sl.
